beats.activity: Wake up, make espresso, read the news and check weather.
beats.reasoning: Tessa is an early riser; 6:15am fits her rhythm. She checks the rain forecast and SR-520 closure—this will shape her commute decision.

beats.activity: Drive to Sea-Tac via I-5 southbound, avoiding SR-520 closure.
beats.reasoning: SR-520 eastbound is closed 9am–noon; Tessa leaves early (6:50am) to reach Sea-Tac before the closure window. I-5 is her reliable route anyway.

beats.activity: Work shift at Sea-Tac tower; steady traffic, light rain doesn't affect operations.
beats.reasoning: 8-hour shift (7:35am–3:45pm) is typical for an air traffic controller. Rainy conditions are routine for Seattle; no drama in the tower today.

beats.activity: Drive home via I-5 northbound; SR-520 eastbound closure has ended, but she sticks to I-5.
beats.reasoning: Heading back to Mount Baker after work. The closure is over by 3:45pm, but I-5 is her default route and still clear; no reason to detour.

beats.activity: Grab groceries and a rotisserie chicken from QFC; the rain is light now.
beats.reasoning: Neighborhood errand on the way home or just after; Tessa prefers local shops and the rain is letting up by late afternoon. Quick, practical stop for dinner.

beats.activity: Prepare and eat dinner; listen to music or a podcast.
beats.reasoning: Simple, nourishing dinner at home. Tessa values quiet evenings; she's laid-back and doesn't need to go out every night.

beats.activity: Work on poetry notes and open-mic material; sip tea.; Read a book, wind down; prepare for bed.
beats.reasoning: Tessa mentioned working on notes for an upcoming open-mic; this is core to her identity. Low-energy, reflective evening at home fits her mood after a full work day.
6 hours 45 minutes of sleep, ending just before dawn. Tessa will wake early again tomorrow; this is her natural rhythm.

world_event_prompt: Grey, drizzly Tuesday with steady rain from 7am to 2pm, high of 58F. SR-520 bridge closed eastbound 9am-noon for emergency repair, snarling cross-lake traffic.
